headline_en: Anthropic advances interpretability; Chinese reasoning models keep momentum
headline_zh: Anthropic 公布可解释性新进展，国产推理模型持续发力
lede_en: Eighteen items today. Anthropic shipped a paired release on sparse autoencoders and agentic safety; DeepSeek dropped a new R-series reasoning model on GitHub; academic feeds carried several notable papers on long context and tool use.
lede_zh: 今日共采集 18 项内容。Anthropic 同时发布了关于稀疏自动编码器与 Agent 安全的两篇研究；DeepSeek 在 GitHub 释出新一代 R 系列推理模型权重；学术圈则出现多篇关于长上下文与工具使用的重要论文。

sections_en.title: Interpretability & Alignment
sections_en.body: Anthropic shipped two papers in tandem: one engineering result on scaling sparse autoencoders to 2M features on Claude 4, and one early-warning study on detecting goal drift inside long-running agents. Together they read as a coordinated push on what is the model doing and why.

sections_en.title: Reasoning & Open Models
sections_en.body: DeepSeek released R3-Preview at roughly half the size of R2 while matching it on AIME and LiveCodeBench. Community benchmarks on H20 and domestic accelerators are already circulating. Qwen separately published 30B quantised weights for Qwen3-VL.

sections_en.title: Papers of Note
sections_en.body: arXiv carried several worthwhile papers: a joint MIT/Princeton submission on Recursive Memory Transformers pushing effective context to 100M tokens, and a DeepMind empirical study on emergent protocols in multi-agent RL.

sections_zh.title: 可解释性与对齐
sections_zh.body: Anthropic 同时发布两篇研究：一篇展示了在 Claude 4 上扩展稀疏自动编码器至 200 万特征的工程化方法，另一篇描述了在 Agent 长任务中检测目标偏移的早期信号。两项工作合在一起，构成了对模型在做什么和模型为什么这么做的新一轮回答。

sections_zh.title: 推理与开源模型
sections_zh.body: DeepSeek 释出 R3-Preview，体量较 R2 减半但在 AIME 与 LiveCodeBench 上达到接近水平，社区已开始讨论其在 H20 与国产卡上的推理性价比。Qwen 同时上线 Qwen3-VL 的 30B 量化权重。

sections_zh.title: 论文精选
sections_zh.body: arXiv 新增多篇值得关注的工作：MIT 与 Princeton 联合的Recursive Memory Transformers将有效上下文推进到 1 亿 token；DeepMind 提交关于通过强化学习在多 Agent 中涌现协议的实证研究。
